text: 45 new regression tests across 8 new suites (KernelRegression, ShapeOverflow, IllConditioned, SparseView, Canonicalization, MatrixMarketHeader, SolverRegression, SparseError) plus strengthened DenseLawSuite generators. Red-first per item; sparse strided-destination tests born green after P0 hoisting as expected. Evidence: testAll 94/94 JVM+JS.
